# ⚡️ TurboJS - A mighty JavaScript engine

## Overview

TurboJS is a small and embeddable JavaScript engine. It aims to support the latest
[ECMAScript] specification.

This project is a _fork_ of the [original TurboJS project] by Fabrice Bellard and Charlie Gordon, after it went dormant, with the intent of reigniting its development.

## Getting started

Head over to the [project website] for instructions on how to get started and more
documentation.

## Authors

[@bnoordhuis], [@saghul], and many more [contributors].
